case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. RICHARD HENRY VISOR ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69739114)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VISOR, RICHARD HENRY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 69710965) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT VISOR, RICHARD HENRY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VISOR, RICHARD HENRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 51 SIXTH STREET, UNIT #501 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69710965)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 69709898), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION SERVED MAR-17-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VISOR, RICHARD HENRY
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 69710965) AS TO DEFENDANT VISOR, RICHARD HENRY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VISOR, RICHARD HENRY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 69709898) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
